blended.narrative: Breckenridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,557 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
